response.justification: This candidate is a full-stack web developer whose primary stack is TypeScript, Node.js, and JavaScript. C++ experience is limited to approximately six months at National Instruments (2014–2015) and a bachelor thesis side project — nowhere near the mandatory 5–10 years of hands-on C++ on Windows. There is no fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domain exposure of any kind, and database experience is confined to MongoDB and MySQL rather than SQL Server or Oracle. The mandatory requirements for this role are almost entirely unmet.
strengths: CI/CD pipeline experience (GitLab, Docker, Artifactory) satisfies one optional desirable skill
Java background from Altom Consulting meets another optional desirable criterion
Strong communication skills evidenced by conference talks and multi-day technical workshops
concerns: C++ experience is negligible (~6 months in 2014–2015) — far below the mandatory 5–10 year requirement on Windows
Zero fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domain knowledge
No SQL Server or Oracle experience; relevant database work is limited to MongoDB and MySQL
